overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a first-person exploration of a vibrant futuristic metropolis. The player walks through neon-lit streets, crosses intersections, and passes towering skyscrapers adorned with holographic advertisements in a bustling cyberpunk cityscape.

events.description: crossing the street at a yellow-striped crosswalk as vehicles pass by

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk and crossing the intersection

person in purple jacket and cap walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall buildings with glass facades and overhead highway structures
large pink and red support pillars along the building facade
large digital display showing a woman in purple clothing
tall palm trees lining the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic city sidewalk with towering glass skyscrapers and overhead highway structures visible in the distance. The camera walks forward past pink structural columns and palm trees, approaching a crosswalk. A green sports car drives past on the right as the player character crosses the yellow-striped intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved city street with holographic advertising walls

events.description: turning left onto a narrower street lined with large holographic displays

agents.ego_description: turning left and walking along the street with large digital billboards on the right

notable_agents.action: boxy gray vehicle driving across the intersection ahead

entered.detail: parking garage with graffiti on the dark walls
elevated roadway passing above the street level

segments.scene_description: The player turns left onto a narrower street where large holographic billboards dominate the right side of the view. A multi-level parking structure with graffiti-covered walls becomes visible on the left. The camera moves along the curved asphalt road as a boxy gray vehicle crosses the intersection ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding downtown street with overhead transit structures

events.description: following the curve of the street to the right while passing a steam vent

agents.ego_description: walking along the curving street with tall buildings on both sides

entered.detail: steam rising from a vent in the street surface
black armored police car with emergency lights

segments.scene_description: The camera proceeds down a winding street flanked by the parking garage on the left and holographic walls on the right. Steam rises from a vent in the road ahead, and a futuristic police vehicle is visible parked on the left. The overhead highway structure remains visible above as the street curves gently to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with hotel and commercial buildings

events.description: approaching a wider intersection with a large hotel building visible on the right
waiting at the crosswalk as futuristic vehicles pass through the intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching and crossing the busy intersection near the hotel building

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians waiting at the crosswalk corner
futuristic black car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: large building with blue neon Japanese text reading HOテル
covered pedestrian bridge connecting buildings above the street

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wider intersection dominated by a large hotel building with bright blue neon signage on the right. A digital countdown timer displays 08 seconds near the crosswalk. The camera approaches the intersection where several pedestrians wait, then crosses as futuristic vehicles drive through. An overhead pedestrian walkway spans the street ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with parked vehicles and storefronts

events.description: continuing straight along the sidewalk passing rows of parked cars

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past parked vehicles and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in white outfit walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: row of vintage-style futuristic cars parked along the curb
tall building with multiple holographic advertisements and neon signs

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera walking along a commercial street lined with parked futuristic cars on the left and tall buildings with holographic advertisements on the right. The overhead walkway approaches closer as the camera moves forward. A pedestrian in white walks ahead on the sidewalk as the video continues down the neon-lit city street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a wide, open city intersection into a narrower, more enclosed urban corridor dominated by holographic displays. It begins on a futuristic sidewalk beneath towering glass skyscrapers and overhead highways, moving past pink structural columns and palm trees toward a yellow-striped crosswalk as a green sports car speeds past. As the camera turns left, the environment shifts toward a tighter street where massive holographic billboards on the right contrast with a graffiti-covered multi-level parking structure on the left. The scene then winds further along the curved asphalt, passing a boxy gray vehicle before the view narrows between the parking garage and glowing walls. Finally, the camera proceeds past rising steam from a road vent and a parked police vehicle, following the gentle rightward curve of the street under the looming shadow of the highway.

The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bustling city intersection into a dense commercial corridor of a neon-lit metropolis. It begins by approaching a wide crossing dominated by a hotel with bright blue neon signage and a digital countdown timer, moving past waiting pedestrians as futuristic vehicles stream through the intersection. As the camera crosses the street, the view opens up toward an overhead pedestrian walkway that spans the road ahead. The scene then shifts into a walk along a commercial street, passing a line of parked futuristic cars on the left and towering buildings adorned with holographic advertisements on the right. Finally, the camera follows a pedestrian in white down the sidewalk, drawing closer to the overhead walkway as it continues deeper into the vibrant cityscape.
